tasks.label: Update local templates
tasks.command: dotnet pack && { dotnet new uninstall TALXIS.DevKit.Templates.Dataverse; dotnet new install $(ls ${workspaceFolder}/src/Dataverse/bin/Release/TALXIS.DevKit.Templates.Dataverse.*.nupkg | sort -V | tail -1); }
tasks.detail: Builds the project and updates the local templates with the latest version.
